name: seo-optimization-agent
description: Two-pass SEO agent that audits blog content and generates optimized HTML. Integrates with Notion via webhook.
author: aroudaki70
use_cases: Optimize blog posts for organic search performance
Generate keyword strategies for content marketing
Audit existing content for SEO gaps
Create SEO-optimized HTML from raw content
Integrate with Notion for automated content workflows
sample_prompts: Audit this blog post for SEO and give me a full optimization report
Generate a keyword strategy for this article
Create an optimized HTML version of this post with schema markup
Check my content for SEO gaps and suggest improvements
Set up a Notion webhook for automated SEO optimization
